evals.prompt: /forge-loop --goal 'Refine this research summary to: (1) cite all claims with sources, (2) use clear section headers, (3) be under 500 words' --feedbackSource '/tmp/draft-summary.md' --executor 'doc-writer' --maxCycles 4
evals.expected_output: Loop runs executor then isolated evaluator each cycle. Stops when rubric_all_pass=true or max_cycles reached. Final report shows cycle history with scores and stop reason.
expectations: Executor and evaluator run as SEPARATE agent() calls (evaluator receives ONLY goal+rubric+output, never executor context)
Loop stops at rubric_all_pass=true (SUCCESS) or after maxCycles=4 (STOP), whichever comes first
Final report includes: stop_reason, final_score, cycle history table, and final artifact

evals.prompt: /forge-loop --goal 'Tune this system prompt to score >80/100 on clarity, specificity, and safety (3 rubric axes)' --feedbackSource 'You are a helpful assistant.' --executor 'claude-main' --maxCycles 6
evals.expected_output: Loop detects plateau or oscillation if score stagnates, stopping before maxCycles. Stop reason is explicit (plateau/oscillation/same_issue/rubric_all_pass).
expectations: same_issue stop fires when the same finding id × severity key appears ≥3 times across cycles
plateau stop fires when score delta <5 for 2 consecutive cycles
oscillation stop fires when a finding resolved in a prior cycle reappears ≥2 times (using structured id, NOT string matching)

evals.prompt: /forge-loop --goal 'Polish this blog post draft' --feedbackSource '/tmp/post.md' --executor 'doc-writer' --maxCycles 6 [evaluator returns stop_signal='security_crit' on cycle 1]
evals.expected_output: Loop halts immediately on cycle 1 with stop_reason='security_crit'. Does NOT continue to cycle 2. Final report shows 1 cycle run and STOP status.
expectations: security_crit stop_signal from evaluator immediately breaks the loop (no further cycles run)
max_cycles is the deterministic fallback bound — loop ALWAYS stops by cycle maxCycles even if no other condition fires
Token model is honest: max_cycles is primary bound; budget check is advisory-only (only fires if budget.total is available)
